title: SQL: Compute modulo of rand() in an UPDATE stmt crashes mserver5
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test (v INT, a INT DEFAULT 0, b FLOAT, c VARCHAR(50));
INSERT INTO test (v, b, c) VALUES (23, 1.5, 'foo'), (34, NULL, 'bar'), (12, 2.5, 'baz'), (54, 3.5, 'qux');
UPDATE test SET a = MOD(FLOOR(RAND() * 32), 32) WHERE b IS NOT NULL;
CREATE TABLE test2 (id INT PRIMARY KEY, value INT CHECK (value >= 0));
INSERT INTO test2 (id, value) SELECT v, a FROM test WHERE a IS NOT NULL;
key_bug_features: modulo of rand() in an UPDATE statement
